input.background: Suppose we redo the survey addressed in the prior two exercises, now using n = 250.
input.question: Can we use the Normal approximation to the binomial in this instance?

output.answer: $n p q=(250)(0.05)(0.95)=11.875$. Therefore, the Normal approximation to the binomial can be applied.

sample_size.description: The number of observations or trials in the survey.

meta_info.caption: Pediatric asthma survey, n = 250.
meta_info.section: 8.3 SAMPLING BEHAVIOR OF A COUNT AND PROPORTION
